metadata.description: Deploy the Regolith Harvester Rover to the landing site for excavation of raw regolith from pad and tank farm preparation areas.
metadata.intended_usage: Reference in Phase 1 before site prep foundation work begins.
metadata.author: AI Copilot

task.name: Deploy Regolith Harvester Rover
task.description: Transport and deploy the Regolith Harvester Rover to excavate raw regolith from the landing pad and tank farm sites. This rover removes surface material and feeds it into the TEU/PVE processing pipeline, leaving processed regolith for sintering.
